welcome.heading: Welcome to TRUST-STI
welcome.subheading: A trusted resource for your sexual health journey
welcome.description: TRUST-STI is a confidential tool designed to help you learn about sexually transmitted infections, understand your personal health needs, and prepare for conversations with your healthcare provider. This tool was developed in partnership with tribal communities to provide culturally respectful, empowering health information.

steps.title: Learn
steps.description: Review brief, clear information about sexual health and STI prevention.

steps.title: Reflect
steps.description: Answer confidential questions about your health and well-being.

steps.title: Receive
steps.description: Get personalized recommendations for testing and support services.

steps.title: Share
steps.description: Choose to discuss your results with your provider or share resources with friends.

welcome.disclaimer: This tool is for educational purposes and does not replace medical advice. All information you provide is confidential.

footer.privacyNote: Your responses are confidential and stored securely.
